'''ât-zh-ng''' ('''katazhang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:staircase|staircase]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:staircase|staircase]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| katazhang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitazhang|thitazhang]] || [[word:jitazhang|jitazhang]] || [[word:shitazhang|shitazhang]] || [[word:kitazhang|kitazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutazhang|thuthutazhang]] || [[word:jujutazhang|jujutazhang]] || [[word:shushutazhang|shushutazhang]] || [[word:kukutazhang|kukutazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutazhang|thutazhang]] || [[word:jutazhang|jutazhang]] || [[word:shutazhang|shutazhang]] || [[word:kutazhang|kutazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutazhang|thutazhang]] || [[word:jutazhang|jutazhang]] || [[word:shutazhang|shutazhang]] || [[word:kutazhang|kutazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetazhang|thetazhang]] || [[word:jetazhang|jetazhang]] || [[word:shetazhang|shetazhang]] || [[word:ketazhang|ketazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotazhang|thothotazhang]] || [[word:jojotazhang|jojotazhang]] || [[word:shoshotazhang|shoshotazhang]] || [[word:kokotazhang|kokotazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotazhang|thotazhang]] || [[word:jotazhang|jotazhang]] || [[word:shotazhang|shotazhang]] || [[word:kotazhang|kotazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotazhang|thotazhang]] || [[word:jotazhang|jotazhang]] || [[word:shotazhang|shotazhang]] || [[word:kotazhang|kotazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtazhang|thĂŠtazhang]] || [[word:jĂŠtazhang|jĂŠtazhang]] || [[word:shĂŠtazhang|shĂŠtazhang]] || [[word:kĂŠtazhang|kĂŠtazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatazhang|thathatazhang]] || [[word:jajatazhang|jajatazhang]] || [[word:shashatazhang|shashatazhang]] || [[word:kakatazhang|kakatazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatazhang|thatazhang]] || [[word:jatazhang|jatazhang]] || [[word:shatazhang|shatazhang]] || [[word:katazhang|katazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatazhang|thatazhang]] || [[word:jatazhang|jatazhang]] || [[word:shatazhang|shatazhang]] || [[word:katazhang|katazhang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatazhang|shatazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatazhang|goshatazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatazhang|gokishatazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatazhangnĂŒ|shatazhangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhangnknĂŒ|goshatazhangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhangnĂŒ|gokishatazhangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatazhangshĂ«|shatazhangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkshĂ«|goshatazhangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatazhangshĂ«|gokishatazhangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhangro|shatazhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkro|goshatazhangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhangro|gokishatazhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhangmu|shatazhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkmu|goshatazhangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhangmu|gokishatazhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatazhangsher|shatazhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatazhangnksher|goshatazhangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatazhangsher|gokishatazhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatazhang|shatazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkng|goshatazhangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatazhang|gokishatazhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatazhangya|shatazhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkya|goshatazhangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatazhangya|gokishatazhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatazhangyam|shatazhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkyam|goshatazhangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatazhangyam|gokishatazhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhangnĂŒshĂ«|shatazhangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatazhangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatazhangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhangnĂŒro|shatazhangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhangnknĂŒro|goshatazhangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhangnĂŒro|gokishatazhangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhangnĂŒmu|shatazhangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhangnknĂŒmu|goshatazhangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhangnĂŒmu|gokishatazhangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhangshĂ«nĂŒ|shatazhangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatazhangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatazhangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhangshĂ«ro|shatazhangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkshĂ«ro|goshatazhangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhangshĂ«ro|gokishatazhangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhangshĂ«mu|shatazhangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkshĂ«mu|goshatazhangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhangshĂ«mu|gokishatazhangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhangronĂŒ|shatazhangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkronĂŒ|goshatazhangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhangronĂŒ|gokishatazhangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhangroshĂ«|shatazhangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkroshĂ«|goshatazhangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhangroshĂ«|gokishatazhangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatazhangromu|shatazhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkromu|goshatazhangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatazhangromu|gokishatazhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatazhangmunĂŒ|shatazhangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkmunĂŒ|goshatazhangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatazhangmunĂŒ|gokishatazhangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatazhangmushĂ«|shatazhangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkmushĂ«|goshatazhangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatazhangmushĂ«|gokishatazhangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatazhangmuro|shatazhangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatazhangnkmuro|goshatazhangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatazhangmuro|gokishatazhangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
